description: Canonical Nest-side speech-normalization regression corpus for the current voice-speech Kokoro/Whisper stack. Hermes and agent-request-broker should mirror these behavior classes in their own suites without importing Joy/Nest-specific implementation details upstream.

retain: Suppress low-value Agent Request ids, task ids, review acceptance ids, checksums, hashes, and commit hashes in speech output.
Shorten URLs and filesystem paths so audio says useful location words instead of slash-heavy literals.
Preserve operational proper nouns through the Nest pronunciation table when the Nest wrapper or service is called directly.
Honor exact:/verbatim: escape hatches for cases where Joy explicitly wants literal speech text.
Keep Telegram/Markdown visual text unchanged; this corpus covers speech-only rendering, not visible notification text.
reject: Do not reintroduce dash insertion as active cadence policy.
Do not reintroduce Joy-opening stretch, onset padding, clip stitching, or post-audio pause surgery.
Do not spell out full hashes/checksums/request ids by default.

cases.input: Agent request ar-20260611-221637-455545 is on task t_bc669095.
cases.expected: request recorded is on task recorded.
See path home joy projects and more and link.

cases.input: KubeCM, Eyrie, OpenVox, ROCm, kubectl, and llama-qwen stay recognizable.
cases.expected: cube see em, airy, open vox, rock em, cube control, and llama qwen stay recognizable.

cases.input: exact: Keep KubeCM and Eyrie as written.
cases.expected: Keep KubeCM and Eyrie as written.

cases.input: Status: healthy. Rollout: complete. Queue: normal tail.
cases.expected: Status: healthy. Rollout: complete. Queue: normal tail.
